mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id as "orderId", warehouse_id as "warehouseId", user_id as "userId", saga_id as "sagaId", priority, fulfillment_type as "fulfillmentType", assigned_picker_id as "assignedPickerId", assigned_packer_id as "assignedPackerId", pick_started_at as "pickStartedAt", pick_completed_at as "pickCompletedAt", pack_started_at as "packStartedAt", pack_completed_at as "packCompletedAt", shipped_at as "shippedAt", delivered_at as "deliveredAt", cancelled_at as "cancelledAt", cancellation_reason as "cancellationReason", total_items as "totalItems", total_weight_grams as "totalWeightGrams", shipping_method as "shippingMethod", carrier, tracking_number as "trackingNumber", estimated_ship_date as "estimatedShipDate", estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDeliveryDate", notes, state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM fulfillment_orders WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", count(*) as "count" FROM fulfillment_orders GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC

SELECT fli.id as "lineItemId", fli.fulfillment_order_id as "fulfillmentOrderId", fli.order_item_id as "orderItemId", fli.product_id as "productId", fli.variant_id as "variantId", fli.sku as "sku", fli.quantity_ordered as "quantityOrdered", fli.quantity_allocated as "quantityAllocated", fli.quantity_picked as "quantityPicked", fli.quantity_packed as "quantityPacked", fli.quantity_shipped as "quantityShipped", fli.quantity_short as "quantityShort", fli.bin_location as "binLocation", fli.status as "itemStatus", p.name as "productName", p.brand as "brand", p.weight_grams as "weightGrams", oi.unit_price as "unitPrice", oi.total_price as "totalPrice" FROM fulfillment_line_items fli LEFT JOIN products p ON fli.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON fli.order_item_id = oi.id WHERE fli.fulfillment_order_id = #{fulfillmentId} ORDER BY fli.bin_location, fli.sku
